testcase.name: TC_01_04_loginWithValidAdminCredentials
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "/dashboard". testcase.name: TC_01_04_verifyLoginPageUI

failure.message: Brand pill should show 'Sponsorship Hub' expected [Sponsorship Hub] but found [SPONSORSHIP HUB]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Brand pill should show 'Sponsorship Hub' expected [Sponsorship Hub] but found [SPONSORSHIP HUB] at com.sponsorship.tests.auth.LoginTests.TC_01_04_verifyLoginPageUI(LoginTests.java:154) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 35 stack frames
